mapLinks.label: Day 1 Map — Golden Circle + South Coast
Day 2 Map — South Coast + Glacier Lagoon

sections.heading: Day 1 — Golden Circle + South Coast Waterfalls
items: Pick up Iceland car at KEF · depart ~10:30am
Drive 45 min → Kerið Crater — red volcanic walls, vivid aquamarine lake · walk the rim + descend to lake edge · 12:15pm arrive (~45 min · ISK 600)
Drive 15 min → Lunch in Selfoss — Kaffi Krús or Almar Bakari · 1:15pm (~45 min)
Drive 35 min → Geysir — Strokkur erupts every 5–10 min · watch 2–3 eruptions and leave · 2:45pm (~45 min)
⚠️ Gullfoss optional (10 min from Geysir) — Iceland's most powerful two-tier waterfall · add 45 min if energy allows · 3:45pm
Drive 45 min south → Urriðafoss — Iceland's most voluminous waterfall · 2 min off Route 1 · ground trembles from the force · almost nobody here · 5:30pm (~20 min · free)
Drive 15 min → Seljalandsfoss — walk behind the falls · bring waterproofs! · 6:15pm (~1hr)
Gljúfrabúi — hidden canyon waterfall 5 min walk from Seljalandsfoss · most tour buses skip it · genuinely magical (~30 min)
Drive 20 min → Skógafoss — climb the 527 steps for the top view · evening light is spectacular · 8:15pm (~45 min)
Drive 15 min east → Reynisfjara black sand beach — basalt columns, Reynisdrangar sea stacks · stunning in evening light · (~25 min)
Drive 10 min → Vík village — red-roofed church viewpoint · quick stop (~15 min)
Drive 10 min east → Room in Skeidflot, Skeidflot 871 — check in ~9:30pm · hosted by Arnar · Airbnb ✅

sections.heading: Day 2 — South Coast Full Push
items: Leave Skeidflot 7:00am — already deep on the South Coast, 10km from Dyrhólaey
Dyrhólaey arch — clifftop viewpoint over black sand coast and sea arch · puffins nesting on Lágey islet in June · head to the lower road for the arch · arrive before 8am · (~30 min)
Drive 45 min east → Fjaðrárgljúfur Canyon — 100m deep moss-covered canyon · Game of Thrones Season 8 Episode 1 dragon flight location · ISK 1000 Parka fee · walk the full rim (~1.5hrs)
Lunch in Kirkjubæjarklaustur — 10 min from canyon · quick stop ~30 min

Drive 30 min east → Svínafellsjökull Glacier — 2km side road off Ring Road · 15–20 min walk to viewpoint · deep blue glacial ice + jagged black peaks · Game of Thrones S7 + Interstellar filming location · ⚠️ viewpoint only (rockfall risk advisory) · free · ~45 min total
Drive 1hr east → Jökulsárlón Glacier Lagoon — floating blue icebergs at the edge of Vatnajökull · walk the lagoon shore · seals basking on the ice · truly otherworldly · (~45 min)
Cross the road → Diamond Beach — ice diamonds scattered across jet-black volcanic sand · every piece unique · constantly changing with the tides · free · (~30 min)
Drive ~2hrs west back along Ring Road → BergOne, Ytri-Njarðvík · check in ~5:00pm ✅
Evening 6:30pm: drive 20 min → Reykjanes Peninsula golden hour — Reykjanesviti lighthouse + Bridge Between Continents · 24hr June daylight · spectacular late light
Early night — 5:15am alarm tomorrow for KEF

tags.text: ⏰ Set alarm 5:15am Jun 22 — drive ~45 min to KEF
🐦 Puffins at Dyrhólaey — head to lower Lágey area · most active before 10am in June
💳 Parka app needed: Fjaðrárgljúfur ISK 1000
⚠️ CANCEL Guesthouse 77, Eyrarbakki (Booking.com · $212.37) — replaced by Room in Skeidflot · cancel before Jun 18 free cancel deadline
✓ Room in Skeidflot · Night 1 · Airbnb · $290.36
✓ BergOne · Night 2 · Booking.com · $263.98

summary.highlights: Kerið · Geysir · Seljalandsfoss · Skógafoss · Reynisfjara · Svínafellsjökull · Jökulsárlón Glacier Lagoon · Diamond Beach · Dyrhólaey

items: Return Iceland car at KEF · board 7:20am FI568

Land ZRH 1:05pm · clear Non-Schengen → Schengen passport control · pick up Hertz rental car at Arrivals Hall desk · Conf. L5350959316 · Jeep Compass or similar · allow 60–90 min for immigration + car pickup
Depart ZRH ~2:30–3:00pm · drive 1h 30m, ~95 mi → Blausee Nature Park, Kandergrund

Blausee — crystal-clear deep blue glacial lake in a 20-hectare fairytale forest · walk the lake loop + wooden bridge (~45 min) · glass-bottom boat included in entry · organic trout farm · playground for kids · open until 9pm · CHF 12/adult · CHF 6/child · arrive ~4:30pm
Drive 20 min → Tiny House Diemtigtal · check in · arrive ~6:00pm ✅
Dinner locally or cook in the Tiny House kitchen · early night — big Day 4 tomorrow

tags.text: ✓ Tiny House im schönen Diemtigtal · Airbnb · $255.92 · Jun 22–23 · 1 night
🏷 At Hertz: confirm Swiss vignette (CHF 40) included · confirm cross-border approval for Italy + Slovenia · inspect car before leaving
💙 Blausee tickets: buy online at blausee.ch to skip queue · CHF 12 adult / CHF 6 child
⏰ Book Oeschinensee 8:30am slot tonight at oeschinensee.skiperformance.com — fills up fast in summer

summary.highlights: Fly KEF→ZRH · Hertz pickup · Blausee crystal lake + forest walk · Diemtigtal

items: Leave Diemtigtal 7:30am → drive 30 min → Kandersteg · arrive 8:00am
🏔 Oeschinensee gondola 8:30am — first slot · turquoise alpine lake at 1,578m · lake walk + photos · (~2hrs)
Gondola down 10:30am · drive 56 min → Grindelwald · arrive ~11:30am
Grab sandwiches from a bakery in Grindelwald · Firstbahn gondola up → First (2,166m)
Cliff Walk at First (~30 min) · then Bachalpsee lake hike (~2.5 miles, ~1.5hrs) · eat lunch at the lake with Eiger reflections
Return to First station · gondola all the way down to Grindelwald (25 min · simpler than Bort)
⚠️ Leave Grindelwald by 3:30pm · drive ~5hrs to Munich · arrive ~8:30–9pm

tags.text: ✓ Grindelwald Gondola · #238070 · 2 adults + 2 children
⏰ Book Oeschinensee 8:30am slot NOW at oeschinensee.skiperformance.com — slots fill in summer
🏨 Escape by Landhaus Lindenberg, Buchloe · Conf #6026325459 · $202 ✅

summary.highlights: Oeschinensee 8:30am gondola · Grindelwald First Cliff Walk · Bachalpsee · First Flyer/Glider

items: Leave Buchloe 7:30am → drive ~2h 20min, ~126 mi via A8 → Königssee · arrive ~9:00am · buy tickets at the dock
Boat departs ~9:30am — ride straight to Salet (55 min total · don't get off at St. Bartholomä) · trumpet echo demonstration en route

At Salet: walk 15 min → Obersee lake — pristine mountain lake with the iconic half-submerged boathouse · Röthbach Waterfall (Germany's highest at 470m) visible towering in the distance · (~45 min at lake)
Walk back to Salet (15 min) · board boat to St. Bartholomä (20 min) · beer garden lunch at the historic hunting lodge restaurant (~45 min)
Board final boat back to Königssee Seelände (~35 min) · arrive ~1:30pm
Drive 16 min via B305 → Wimbachklamm Gorge (~1 mile · €4/person · open 7am–7pm) · ~1hr
Drive ~10 min → Wurznwirt, Schneizlreuth · check in ~3:15pm ✅

tags.text: ✓ Wurznwirt · #72072251742511 · Family Suite
⏰ Book Königssee boat online at seenschifffahrt.de — arrive 9am, depart 9:30am · return ticket to Salet ~€29/adult · €14.50/child
⚠️ Ride boat ALL THE WAY to Salet first — do NOT get off at St. Bartholomä · do St. Bartholomä on the way back
🏷 Austrian vignette: buy digital at asfinag.at at least 18 days before entry (by June 6)

summary.highlights: Königssee electric boat → Salet → Obersee lake + Röthbach waterfall view · St. Bartholomä lunch · Wimbachklamm gorge

items: Leave Schneizlreuth 7:30am → ~1hr 30min → Liechtensteinklamm Gorge · arrive ~9am · aim for ticket counter at opening to avoid 10am–2pm peak
Deepest gorge in Alps — Helix staircase, 444 stairs, thundering waterfall at the end · (~2.5hrs · €16/adult · €9/child 2026)
Drive ~1hr 20min → HOMEBOUND Apartments, Bad Goisern · check in ~1:30pm ✅
Drive 10 min → Hallstatt for evening lakeside walk · arrive after 4pm to avoid peak crowds
⚠️ Parking tip: if P1 and P2 signs show full on approach, skip them entirely · drive 5 min to Obertraun · park free at the train station · take the ferry across into Hallstatt (~10 min)

tags.text: ✓ HOMEBOUND Apartments · Expedia #72072198804917
🅿️ Hallstatt parking: if P1/P2 full → drive to Obertraun (5 min) · park free at train station · ferry into Hallstatt
💶 Liechtensteinklamm 2026: €16/adult · €9/child · cash or card · no booking needed

summary.highlights: Liechtensteinklamm gorge (deepest in Alps) · Hallstatt evening walk

items: Arrive Hallstatt 8:45am — before the tour buses · park at P1 or use Obertraun ferry · famous photo spot from lakeside before crowds
Echern Valley → Waldbachstrub Waterfall — gorge trail, mossy forest, dramatic 60m waterfall at the end · ~3 miles · ~2.5hrs · quiet and uncrowded
Back in village ~11:30am — Beinhaus (Bone House) — 1,200 painted skulls in the Catholic cemetery · macabre and fascinating, especially for teenagers · ~15 min · small entry fee
Roman ruins under Dachsteinsport Janu — 7,000-year-old ruins discovered during a shop renovation · free to visit · almost nobody knows this exists · ~15 min
Lakeside lunch ~12:30pm — try local char (Saibling) at one of the waterfront restaurants
⚠️ Hallstatt Skywalk + Salt Mine + Funicular CLOSED until June 30 — your visit is June 26
Drive 15 min → Obertraun · Dachstein Krippenstein cable car · depart ~1:30pm
At mid-station (Schönbergalm): register for Giant Ice Cave guided tour immediately on arrival — timed entry, tours run continuously (~50 min · -2°C inside · bring a warm layer!)

Cable car to summit (2,109m) → walk 20 min → 5 Fingers viewing platform — 5 steel platforms extending from the cliff · one glass floor looking straight down · one baroque picture frame framing Hallstatt below · truly spectacular (~1hr at top)
Giant Ice Cave guided tour ~3:15pm — subterranean glaciers, stalactites, rope bridge, multimedia show · genuinely otherworldly (~50 min)
Cable car back down · back at HOMEBOUND ~4:45pm ✅
Dinner in Bad Goisern or back in Hallstatt — the village is magical in the evening when the day crowds have gone

tags.text: ⛔ Hallstatt Skywalk + Salt Mine + Funicular CLOSED until Jun 30 — your visit is Jun 26
🎟 Dachstein Krippenstein: book online at dachstein-salzkammergut.com · Panorama ticket + Ice Cave ~€60/adult · €34/child · bring warm layer for cave (-2°C)
🅿️ Hallstatt parking: P1 €4/hr · or Obertraun free + ferry into Hallstatt (5 min drive + 10 min ferry)

summary.highlights: Hallstatt village · Echern Valley waterfall · Bone House · Roman ruins · Dachstein Krippenstein 5 Fingers + Giant Ice Cave

items: Checkout 10am

⚠️ Gosausee optional — 15 min from Bad Goisern · if energy allows, walk 2 min to the lake edge for the iconic Dachstein glacier reflection · skip the full loop if behind schedule · back on road by 10:45am
Drive south → Grossglockner High Alpine Road north entry · arrive ~12:30pm · toll €46.50/car · pack warm layers
⭐ Fuscher Törl — first major viewpoint on the way up · memorial chapel overlooking the hairpin turns you just climbed · quick 15 min stop
⭐ Edelweißspitze detour — short cobblestone side road to the highest point on the road (2,571m) · 360° panorama of 30+ peaks over 3,000m · free · ~20 min
Kaiser-Franz-Josefs-Höhe — main glacier viewpoint · Pasterze glacier up close · walk to glacier viewing platform · ~1.5hrs at the top
Drive ~2hrs 30min south and east → arrive Lake Bled ~8:30pm ✅
🧺 Laundry #2 — hand bag to Pr' Matjon hosts on arrival (service laundry, not self-service)

tags.text: 👕 Laundry #2 — hand bag to Pr' Matjon hosts on arrival (service laundry)
✓ Pr' Matjon Pension · Expedia #72072265408188
💶 Grossglockner toll 2026: €46.50/car · pack warm layers at 2,500m even in June
🇸🇮 Slovenia Dars e-Vignette: buy weekly class 2A at evinjeta.dars.si before crossing · €16 · Fine €300+ if missing

summary.highlights: Gosausee optional · Grossglockner High Alpine Road · Fuscher Törl · Edelweißspitze 2,571m · Pasterze glacier · Lake Bled

items: 7:30am — Mala Osojnica + Ojstrica viewpoints — both at the same trailhead · Ojstrica first (lower, easier, most famous close-up island view) · then Mala Osojnica (steeper, 100-step metal staircase, ~35 min up · best panoramic view of Bled Island and the castle) · total ~1.5hrs for both
Bled Castle — clifftop fortress, panoramic views · ~1.5hrs · €19/adult · €7/child (2026) · one child under 14 free with two adults

Mostnica Gorge — forest gorge trail from Stara Fužina village · walk first 2km to the second bridge (~1hr return) · pause on Devil's Bridge — river roars through a 20m deep slot below your feet · ⚠️ full walk to Voje Waterfall is 3hrs round trip — optional if energy allows

Drive ~20 min to Vogel Cable Car at Ukanc, Lake Bohinj · arrive by 4:30pm latest (last ascent ~5pm in June) · panoramic Julian Alps views · Orlove Glave chairlift at summit often included in ticket — reaches 1,663m for 360° panorama

tags.text: ⏰ Vogel Cable Car: be at Ukanc base by 4:30pm — last ascent ~5pm in June
💶 Bled Castle 2026: €19/adult · €7/child · one child under 14 free with 2 adults

summary.highlights: Ojstrica + Mala Osojnica viewpoints · Bled Castle · Mostnica Gorge + Devil's Bridge · Vogel Cable Car + Orlove Glave chairlift

days.title: Vintgar + Peričnik + Radovljica 🎂
days.birthday: 🎂 Happy Birthday Veena! — celebrated in one of the most beautiful places on Earth, Lake Bled, Slovenia.

items: 10:00am — Vintgar Gorge (pre-booked timed entry · ref PE01-BL0I-808) · helmet provided at entrance — mandatory, €50 fine if not worn · 1.6km boardwalk over blue-green water → Šum Waterfall (13m drop at the gorge end — follow signs, 5 min detour before the return trail)

⚠️ One-way system — cannot walk back on boardwalk · choose return trail at the end: King of Triglav trail (~45 min) recommended for the family — forest path with views toward Bled Castle · 'River of Trees' trail is 2hrs · expect to finish ~1:00pm total
⚠️ Savica Waterfall optional — 78m cascade, 558 steps up (~1.5hrs) · only if family has energy after the full Vintgar loop · if tired, skip and go straight to Radovljica

⭐ Peričnik Waterfall as Savica alternative — 25 min drive from Bled into Triglav National Park · double waterfall (upper 52m + lower 16m) · flat easy path · the trail goes directly behind the lower falls — you walk through the curtain of water · free · ~1hr · far less effort than Savica's 558 steps · perfect for a birthday morning
Radovljica old town — medieval town, gingerbread workshop at Lectar Museum (opens noon · book 2 days ahead for private workshop), beekeeping museum (~1hr)
Back to Bled for the birthday evening 🎂

sections.heading: 🎂 Birthday Extras
items: Bled cream cake at Park Café — the iconic local dessert · ~€6.50–7.00 · birthday treat! 🎂

Pletna boat to Bled Island — traditional hand-rowed wooden boat · €20/adult 2026 · on the island: ring the wishing bell 3 times — legend says it makes your wishes come true · perfect for Veena's birthday · church + bell tower separate €12
Special birthday dinner lakeside — try Vila Bled or Restavracija Belvedere for the occasion

tags.text: ✓ Vintgar Gorge · Invoice PE01-BL0I-808 · €40 · 10:00am entry Jun 29
⛑️ Vintgar helmets MANDATORY — provided at entrance · €50 fine if not worn
🔔 Pletna boat: €20/adult · ring the wishing bell 3 times on Bled Island — Veena's birthday wish!
🎂 Lectar gingerbread workshop opens noon · book 2 days in advance for private workshop

summary.highlights: Vintgar Gorge + Šum waterfall · King of Triglav return trail · Peričnik Waterfall (walk behind falls) · optional Savica · Radovljica · Pletna boat + wishing bell · Veena's birthday dinner 🎉

items: Early checkout 10:30am · drive west via Passo Falzarego · arrive Lagazuoi cable car ~1:30pm (~125 mi, ~3hrs with photo stops)
🎟 Rent equipment first at Falzarego pass info-point — helmet + headlamp set ~€20/person · mandatory for WWI tunnels

Lagazuoi cable car — 3-min ride to 2,752m · ~€27–30/adult return · last uphill 4:40pm · walk 5 min to Rifugio Lagazuoi for one of the best panoramic views in the entire Dolomites before heading to tunnels

⭐ Galleries of Piccolo Lagazuoi — hike DOWN through the WWI tunnels back to Falzarego pass (~2hrs, entirely downhill) · far more immersive than just viewing the summit · headlamp essential · emerges right at the cable car base
Drive 25 min → Das Auss.Zeit, Außervillgraten · check in ~6pm ✅

⚠️ Lago di Braies: save for Day 12 sunrise — parking fills fast regardless of season · 5am departure from Außervillgraten guarantees a spot and gives the magical mirror reflections that disappear when wind picks up mid-morning

tags.text: ✓ Das Auss.Zeit · Expedia #72072265941383 · 10.0★
⛑️ Rent helmet + headlamp at Falzarego pass info-point ~€20/person — mandatory for WWI tunnels
⏰ Lago di Braies: skip Day 11 — save for Day 12 sunrise (5am, guaranteed parking + mirror reflections)

summary.highlights: Passo Falzarego · Lagazuoi cable car · Rifugio panorama · Galleries WWI tunnel descent · Außervillgraten

days.title: Lago di Braies + Tre Cime di Lavaredo

items: Leave 5:00am → drive 25 min → Lago di Braies sunrise · arrive ~5:25am · magical mirror reflections of the Dolomites · walk the flat lakeside loop · almost nobody here · back by 8am
Drive to Misurina · take shuttle from Misurina to Rifugio Auronzo (~€10 · arrive before 8:30am to avoid queues) · private cars not permitted on the final section in summer
⭐ Cadini di Misurina viewpoint (Path 117) — from Rifugio Auronzo, 1hr round trip to a jagged ridge of needle-like spires · world-famous view, less crowded than Tre Cime itself

⭐ Tre Cime di Lavaredo loop — ~6.2 miles (10km) · the three iconic peaks from all angles · at Rifugio Locatelli: take the short steep climb to the WWI caves at Sasso di Sesto for a perfectly framed photo of the peaks through a cave opening
Return shuttle to Misurina · drive 25 min back to Außervillgraten

tags.text: 🅿️ Pre-book Tre Cime parking/shuttle online at auronzo.it — mandatory in summer, fills weeks ahead
⏰ Misurina shuttle: arrive before 8:30am to beat queues · ~€10/person

summary.highlights: Lago di Braies sunrise · Cadini di Misurina viewpoint · Tre Cime loop · WWI caves at Sasso di Sesto

days.title: Thurntaler + Cinque Torri + Lago di Sorapis

mapLinks.label: Day 13 Map — Thurntaler + Cinque Torri + Sorapis

items: Leave 7:00am → Thurntaler summit hike from Außervillgraten · starts right at the village · drive to Thurntaler Rast restaurant (toll-free road) · hike to 2,407m summit via trail 7 (~2.5hrs up and back) · 360° panorama of Villgrater mountains, Carnic Alps, Lienz Dolomites — and Tre Cime from the Austrian side — a completely different perspective from yesterday
Back at car by 10:30am · drive 35 min → Cinque Torri · Scoiattoli chairlift up · five dramatic rock towers rising from the plateau
Cinque Torri loop (~3 miles) — all five towers + extensive WWI open-air museum with original trenches and fortifications still intact · genuinely moving (~2hrs)
Drive 20 min → Cortina d'Ampezzo · lunch on Corso Italia · 🧺 Laundry #3 drop-off at self-service laundromat

Drive 15 min → Passo Tre Croci trailhead · Lago di Sorapis hike (Trail 215) — 2hrs each way · milky turquoise glacial lake at 1,925m at the foot of the 'Finger of God' rock spire · some narrow exposed ledges with cables — safe but worth knowing · start no later than 2:30pm to be back before dark
⚠️ Natural cut points: skip Thurntaler if tired from Day 12 · skip Lago di Sorapis if tired after Cinque Torri · all three is only if everyone is still going strong

tags.text: 🧺 Laundry #3 — self-service laundromat in Cortina d'Ampezzo, Jul 2 afternoon
✓ Das Auss.Zeit · Expedia #72072265941383 · 10.0★
⏰ Lago di Sorapis: start no later than 2:30pm from Passo Tre Croci · Trail 215 · good hiking boots essential — polished rocks are slippery
🏔 Thurntaler: drive toll-free mountain road from village centre to Thurntaler Rast · 6-seater cable car from Sillian also an option

summary.highlights: Thurntaler 2,407m summit · Cinque Torri + WWI trenches · Cortina lunch + laundry · Lago di Sorapis turquoise lake

items: Checkout 8:00am · drive ~2hrs → Innsbruck · arrive ~10:15am · ⚠️ check S16 Arlberg Tunnel for maintenance closures — if closed, route over Arlberg Pass adds ~40 min

Nordkette cable car first — take Hungerburgbahn from Congress station → Seegrube → Hafelekar summit (2,334m) · panoramic Alps views · ~€50–56/adult return · last ascent 5pm · weather-dependent, go first before lunch (~2hrs total)
Innsbruck old town — Golden Roof facade (exterior, skip the museum interior to save time) · Maria-Theresien-Strasse · Tyrolean lunch
Drive ~1hr 30min west via S16 → Dornbirn · check in Vienna House ~4:00–4:30pm
⭐ Karren Cable Car (5 min from hotel) — glass-floor 'Karren-Kante' viewpoint over the Rhine Valley and Lake Constance · open until ~6pm in summer · perfect early evening activity · ~1hr
🧺 Laundry #4 — hotel offers 24hr service laundry (not same-day) · for same-evening wash use self-service laundromat in Dornbirn

tags.text: 👕 Laundry #4 — hotel is 24hr service (not same-day) · self-service laundromat in Dornbirn for same-evening wash
✓ Vienna House Martinspark · Expedia #72072266618761
💶 Nordkette: ~€50–56/adult return · last ascent 5pm · book online to skip queue
⚠️ Check S16 Arlberg Tunnel for 2026 maintenance closures before departing — detour via Arlberg Pass adds ~40 min

summary.highlights: Nordkette 2,334m · Innsbruck Golden Roof · old town · Karren Cable Car over Rhine Valley

days.title: Liechtenstein → Schaffhausen → Rhine Falls → Zurich
days.meta: Jul 4 · Dornbirn → Vaduz → Rhine Falls → Zurich

items: Leave 9am · drive 28 mi, 33 min → Vaduz, Liechtenstein 🇱🇮
Vaduz Castle viewpoint — hike up (~20 min walk · free) · exterior and grounds only (private royal residence, interior not open) · views over the Rhine valley
Passport stamp at Vaduz tourist office on Städtle — CHF 3 / €3.30 per person · the kids will love this!
Vaduz Kunstmuseum — striking black cube building · appreciate the architecture from outside (~5 min walk-by) · skip the interior
Drive 45 mi, 55 min → Schaffhausen old town · Munot Fortress — free, 16th-century round fortress, spiral cannon ramp to the tower for views · cobblestone streets and painted bay windows · ~45 min

⭐ Stein am Rhein optional — if ahead of schedule, drive 20 min east from Munot · Switzerland's most beautifully preserved medieval village · half-timbered houses with original Renaissance murals · completely flat and walkable · ~45 min
Drive 4 mi, 10 min → Rhine Falls (Rheinfall) — Europe's largest waterfall by volume · boat to the central rock (CHF 10.50–11/adult) · ~1hr
Drive 28 mi, 45 min → Zurich · ⚠️ park in a garage — Parkhaus Hohe Promenade (near lake) or Parkhaus Urania (near centre) · do not attempt to drive into Altstadt
Lindenhof Hill — free hilltop park, best free panoramic photo of the Altstadt and Limmat River · ~15 min
Zurich Altstadt — Niederdorf quarter, Grossmünster twin towers (climb for views €5), Fraumünster (Chagall windows), Bahnhofstrasse
Lake Zurich — evening promenade · Bürkliplatz to Zürichhorn · golden hour Alps views
Dinner at Zeughauskeller — historic 1487 arsenal turned beer hall · massive Swiss portions · book a table in advance · back at hotel by 9:30pm
Overnight Radisson Blu ZRH — 3–7 min walk to check-in counters via indoor terminal connection ✅

tags.text: 🏨 Book Radisson Blu ZRH now — 3–7 min walk to check-in via indoor terminal connection
⏰ Set alarm 5:30am Jul 5 — Hertz drop-off 6:30am, flight 7:55am
💳 Rhine Falls boat 2026: CHF 10.50–11/adult to central rock
🍺 Zeughauskeller Zurich: book a table in advance — extremely popular, individual diners may have to queue without reservation
🅿️ Zurich: park in Parkhaus Hohe Promenade (near lake) or Parkhaus Urania (near centre) — do not drive into Altstadt

summary.highlights: Vaduz Castle viewpoint · passport stamp 🇱🇮 · Schaffhausen Munot Fortress · optional Stein am Rhein · Rhine Falls boat · Lindenhof Hill · Zurich Altstadt · Zeughauskeller dinner

items: Return Hertz car at ZRH ~6:30am · drop-off deadline 7:00am · Hertz desk in Arrivals/Ground Transport level · Conf. L5350959316
Depart 7:55am FI571/FI689 via Reykjavík → Orlando MCO 8:50pm

summary.highlights: Hertz drop-off 7am · Depart 7:55am FI571 via KEF → MCO 8:50pm

checklist.label: 🚗 Confirm Italy + Slovenia cross-border at Hertz ZRH
❌ Cancel Guesthouse 77, Eyrarbakki — Booking.com · free cancel by Jun 18

accommodationBreakdown.property: Escape by Landhaus Lindenberg, Buchloe 🇩🇪 · Night 4

cash.for: Hut lunches, Rhine Falls boat, laundromat, Nordkette
Vintgar, Vogel cable car, Bled Castle
Lagazuoi, Tre Cime shuttle, Cinque Torri

reminders.text: Bring waterproof jackets for Iceland — especially Seljalandsfoss (walk behind the falls)
Late June Iceland = 24hr daylight — bring eye masks
Grossglockner toll €46.50/car — pack warm layers at 2,504m even in summer
Tre Cime: always take Misurina shuttle (€10), fills by 9am
Nordkette Innsbruck: weather-dependent — go first before old town
ETIAS: currently projected Q4 2026 — verify at europa.eu 30 days before departure (May 20). If launched early, each traveller needs online authorisation (~€7–20)
Slovenia Dars e-Vignette — buy at evinjeta.dars.si before crossing. Automated cameras, fine €300+ if missing
Austrian digital vignette — buy at asfinag.at by June 6 (18-day waiting period before Jun 24 entry)
Travel insurance: Schengen requires minimum €30,000 medical coverage per person — carry printed proof from your provider
Emergency number: 112 — works in all 7 countries (EU + Switzerland + Slovenia) · free from any mobile · English operators available
Download offline maps before leaving home (Google Maps or maps.me) for all 7 countries — signal is patchy in the Dolomites and Julian Alps
Tap water is excellent in Switzerland, Austria, and Slovenia — bring reusable bottles, saves ~$150 over the trip vs buying bottled water
Pack detergent sheets (lightweight, TSA-safe) for 4 laundry stops — many European apartment washers don't provide free soap
Zurich Airport hotel still needed (Jul 4–5). Radisson Blu ZRH is 3–7 min walk to check-in counters via indoor terminal connection. Worth the extra $50 vs a 4:30am shuttle.
Use the HOMEBOUND (Bad Goisern) and Das Auss.Zeit (Außervillgraten) kitchens for dinners — a single restaurant dinner in Switzerland for 4 easily hits $180
Liechtenstein passport stamp CHF 3 / €3.30 at Vaduz tourist office — worth every cent!
